scripts.check: npm run static && npm test && npm run release:test && npm run package:check
scripts.compat:test: npm run openai-compat:sdk && npm run openai-compat:openapi
scripts.static: npm run typescript:static && npm run proxy:static && npm run python:static && npm run elixir:static && npm run go:static
scripts.test: npm --workspace @usetemi/codex-sdk test && npm run proxy:test && npm run python:test && npm run elixir:test && npm run go:test
scripts.package:check: npm run typescript:package && npm run proxy:package && npm run python:package && npm run elixir:package
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @usetemi/codex-sdk run typecheck && npm --workspace @usetemi/codex-openai-proxy run typecheck
scripts.proxy:package: npm --workspace @usetemi/codex-openai-proxy run build && python3 scripts/check_package_artifacts.py --package proxy
scripts.python:static: uv run --project packages/python ruff format --check . && uv run --project packages/python ruff check . && uv run --project packages/python ty check .
scripts.python:test: cd packages/python && uv run python -m unittest discover -s tests
scripts.python:package: rm -rf packages/python/dist && uv build --project packages/python && uvx --from twine twine check --strict packages/python/dist/*
scripts.openai-compat:openapi: uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/check_openai_openapi_subset.py
